series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to manufactured home installation permits. This record series includes, but is not limited to, applications, grants or denials of a permit or extension; installation permits; temporary occupancy permits; notices of expiring permit; alternative designs; installation plans; foundation designs; homeowner/installation agreements; and inspection reports.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: record shall be destroyed three years expiration/revocation of installation permit (including any extension periods), three years denial of an installation permit, or three years date a home passed a final inspection, whichever is later. ; Paper: If an electronic version of record exists, paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of record does not exist
